summary: P0 Subscription Management Testing Complete - All 12 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Subscription management features are fully functional.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test therapists during pytest execution for subscription testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Subscription Management fully tested and working. All features verified: 1) New therapists automatically get 30-day trial subscription (verified via API and UI info message). 2) Assign subscription plan works via /api/admin/therapists/{id}/assign-subscription. 3) Change subscription plan works by calling assign-subscription with different plan_id. 4) Extend subscription works via /api/admin/therapists/{id}/extend-subscription. 5) Fix Missing Subscriptions migration works via /api/admin/migrate-subscriptions. 6) Subscription changes persist and reflect immediately in therapist profiles and list view. UI elements verified: Subscription dialog with Assign Trial, Assign Plan dropdown (Basic, TEST_Plan, Silver), Extend Subscription input. Subscription badges show correctly (trial/active with plan name and days remaining).

P0-1_new_therapist_trial.description: New therapists automatically get 30-day trial subscription
P0-1_new_therapist_trial.frontend_verified: Add Therapist dialog shows trial subscription info message

P0-2_assign_subscription_plan.description: Super Admin can assign subscription plan to therapist
P0-2_assign_subscription_plan.frontend_verified: Subscription dialog has plan dropdown with 3 plans

P0-3_change_subscription_plan.description: Super Admin can change therapist's subscription plan
P0-3_change_subscription_plan.frontend_verified: Same assign-subscription endpoint used for changing plans

P0-4_extend_subscription.description: Super Admin can extend subscription by adding days
P0-4_extend_subscription.frontend_verified: Extend Subscription section with days input and button

P0-5_migrate_subscriptions.description: Fix Missing Subscriptions migration button works
P0-5_migrate_subscriptions.frontend_verified: Fix Missing Subscriptions button visible and enabled

P0-6_subscription_persistence.description: Subscription changes persist and reflect immediately
P0-6_subscription_persistence.frontend_verified: Subscription badges update correctly in therapist list

add_therapist_dialog.trial_info_message: New therapists automatically receive a 30-day trial subscription.
